news.title: Oil prices fall nearly 4% after U.S. Energy Secretary says Hormuz ship traffic is increasing
news.summary: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said a deal with Tehran to reopen Hormuz is close. But such an agreement still has not materialized.

news.title: Social Security retirement trust fund may be depleted in 2032, new trustees report finds
news.summary: The Social Security Administration has released a report with new projections as to when the trust funds that help pay benefits may be depleted. The report was released on Wednesday.

news.title: Trump family got about $500M from crypto venture — but investors saw steep losses
news.summary: Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. celebrated a deal with Alt5 Sigma that generated roughly $500 million for the Trump family. The company's shares are down 93%.

news.title: JPMorgan Chase plans to deploy more powerful AI agents this year
news.summary: JPMorgan Chase's move suggests long-running AI agents are close to clearing the security and governance hurdles that have slowed adoption inside big companies.

news.title: Home sales surged in May to the highest level since December
news.summary: Home sales rebounded in May as mortgage rates dropped back a bit in April. But prices are still rising, and sales are expected to continue to rise.

news.title: This proposed federal budget cut could eliminate job training for 42,000 vulnerable seniors
news.summary: A job-training program for low-income older adults is set to lose funding under President Donald Trump’s proposed budget for 2027. More stringent work requirements for food aid and healthcare coverage go into effect.

news.title: These ETFs surged thanks to early SpaceX stakes. What happens to them after the IPO?
news.summary: Investors have recently flocked to ETFs that already have SpaceX exposure. But those funds are about to lose “whatever scarcity value’ they once had, one expert warns.

news.title: This stock-market strategy has cheap exposure to AI and points to an advantage for closed-end funds
news.summary: The fund is diversified and has been an excellent performer. It highlights the advantages of a closed-end structure. The fund is currently valued at around £1.5bn.

news.title: Millions of grandparents are spending their retirements raising their grandkids — and it’s taking a financial toll
news.summary: Grandparent-headed households are more likely to live in poverty. Grandparents head more than half of all households in the U.S., according to a new study.

news.title: How teens can turn a summer job into an extra $500,000 in savings when they’re older
news.summary: Teens who don’t have summer jobs miss out on valuable work experience, experts say. They also miss prime years to invest their income.
